videos.title: HTML5 Drag and Drop API Crash Course
videos.description: Full crash course covering drag sources, drop targets, DataTransfer, and file uploads.

videos.title: Drag and Drop JavaScript Tutorial
videos.description: Practical tutorial building a drag-and-drop list and a file upload interface.

videos.title: JavaScript Drag and Drop Explained
videos.description: Clear, concise explanation of all drag-and-drop events and the DataTransfer API.

videos.title: Build a Kanban Board with Drag and Drop
videos.description: Complete tutorial on building a Trello-style Kanban board with drag-and-drop functionality.

videos.title: Drag and Drop File Upload with Preview
videos.description: Build a drag-and-drop file upload zone with image previews and progress indicators.

videos.title: Touch Events for Mobile Drag and Drop
videos.description: Implement custom touch-based drag-and-drop for mobile devices using touch events.

videos.title: Accessible Drag and Drop Interfaces
videos.description: Learn how to make drag-and-drop interfaces accessible to keyboard and screen reader users.

videos.title: SortableJS Drag and Drop Library
videos.description: Overview of the SortableJS library for creating responsive drag-and-drop lists.
